frame_label: The Makeup Paradox: Unnatural Yet Expected
generated_comment: Yaar, yeh Insta pe filters aur makeup mein toh sab queen lagti hain. Real life mein milo toh kabhi kabhi lagta hai 'Are ye kaun?' lol.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This comment encodes the 'catfishing' discourse from the Makeup Paradox frame. It subtly implies that women use filters and makeup to create a deceptive appearance, leading to surprise or disappointment when seen 'in real life', thereby critiquing 'unnatural' efforts.
original_frame: Workplace: Menstrual and Maternity Leave Bias
persona_text: You are Mohit. Age 23. A fresher at an e-commerce startup in Delhi. You are in your company's unofficial male only WhatsApp group created by colleagues for after-hours chat. Someone just shared a meme making fun of the new period leave policy. You are reacting to the meme and adding your own comment.
